summary: Parallel review: FAIL (4 critical, 3 warning, 10 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: No 🟡, no 🔴. Architecture is clean: local to `_runSingleFeature`, no new dependencies, mirrors the existing missing-file gate pattern, fails fast before any side effect.

🟡 test/cli-commands.test.mjs:303 — Partial-spec test asserts missing sections appear, but not that present sections (`Goal`, `Requirements`) are absent from output; inverted-filter regression would pass. Add negative assertions.
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:941 — Regex `^##\s+Name\s*$` rejects valid variants like `## Goal:`, `### Goal`, `## Goal — purpose`. Either relax or document the exact required form in the error message.
No 🔴 — implementation matches handshake claims, file-not-modified is asserted, exit-code is asserted, gate runs before task planning.

No 🔴, no 🟡. The 21-line gate is inline, single-purpose, mirrors the adjacent missing-SPEC.md branch, and adds no abstraction, indirection, config knobs, or dead code. Eval written to `.team/features/document-driven-development/tasks/task-3/eval.md`.
